title: Spec Tab Outline
description: Studio UI for **Spec Tab Outline** (tab label **Outline**, not Schema): navigable structure for a workspace canonical spec via `getSpecOutline`.
context: Studio UI for **Spec Tab Outline** (tab label **Outline**, not Schema): navigable structure for a workspace canonical spec via `getSpecOutline`.

rules: The spec center tab strip MUST display **Outline** for this view. Requirements MUST NOT refer to “schema” for navigable artifact structure.

rules.requirement: spec tab polls outline while visible
rules: While the Outline tab is visible, the view MUST load outline JSON via `getSpecOutline(workspace, specPath)` on tab-scoped poll ticks.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors.

scenarios.name: Tab strip shows Outline
then: AND tab named Schema is not present

scenarios.requirement: spec tab polls outline while visible
scenarios.name: Outline tab loads outline JSON
then: AND renders JSON outline or error state

then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
